title: Parrot2Crow
description: Turns parrots into crows - Works with other resource packs!
body:
![Parrot2Crow Resource Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28e495f9bab4bfb05b28664a639e339359ffe837.png)

This resource pack replaces parrots with crows, featuring custom textures and authentic crow sounds that bring a darker, more grounded tone to your world. Watch them perch on rooftops, wander through forests, and echo across the mist. Every scene feels quieter, moodier and more cinematic - Perfect for creating an adventure maps, or simply giving your survival world a new identity.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JVoVzBf7FN8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

- Q: Does this work with my resource pack?
  - A: Yes.
- Q: Do I need any mods to use this?
  - A: No.

</details>
